title: Pandora Playback Response Structure
description: Documentation of the playback data structure returned by the Pandora GraphQL API

fields.name: trackToken
fields.description: Unique token for this track instance, used for feedback operations

fields.name: audioUrl
fields.description: Streaming audio URL - subscription and device-specific

fields.name: allowFeedback
fields.description: Whether thumbs up/down feedback is allowed for this track

fields.name: allowSkip
fields.description: Whether the track can be skipped (subscription dependent)
